CustomField.formula:
IF( ISPICKVAL(Entity_Type__c , "Company"),
IF(GST_Document_Uploaded__c = false,"GST Certificate, ","")& IF(PAN_Document_Uploaded__c = false,"PAN Card, ","")& IF(RERA_Document_Uploaded__c = false,"RERA Certificate, ","")& IF(Aadhar_Document_Uploaded__c = false,"Aadhar Card, ","")& IF(Address_Proof_Document_Uploaded__c = false,"Address Proof, ","")& IF(Cancel_Cheque_Document_Uploaded__c = false,"Cancel Cheque, ","")& IF(Company_Registration_Document_Uploaded__c = false,"Company Registration, ","")& IF(AND(Authorization_Letter_Document_Uploaded__c = false,Board_Resolution_Document_Uploaded__c = false),"Authorization Letter / Board Resolution, ",""),
IF( GST_Document_Uploaded__c = false, "GST Certificate, ", "" )
&
IF( PAN_Document_Uploaded__c = false, "PAN Card, ", "" )
&
IF( RERA_Document_Uploaded__c = false, "RERA Certificate, ", "" )
&
IF( Aadhar_Document_Uploaded__c = false, "Aadhar Card, ", "" )
&
IF( Address_Proof_Document_Uploaded__c = false, "Address Proof, ", "" )
&
IF( Cancel_Cheque_Document_Uploaded__c = false, "Cancel Cheque, ", "" )
)
CustomField.label: Pending Document
